candidate_definition_hints.text: Inquirer file selector prompt, you can navigate freely between directories, choose what type of files you want to allow and it is fully customizable.
A prompt implementation for [Inquirer.js](https://github.com/SBoudrias/Inquirer.js) that allows users to interactively select files or directories in the terminal.
